name: Keybase Teams
description: Keybase Teams — End-to-end encrypted team secrets, file sharing, and messaging using PGP-based identity verification.

seo.title: Keybase Teams — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Keybase Teams: Keybase Teams — End-to-end encrypted team secrets, file sharing, and messaging using PGP-based identity verification.

when_to_use: End-to-end encrypted secret sharing for dev teams
PGP-verified identity for secure code signing key distribution
Encrypted team file storage for sensitive credentials
Secure messaging with cryptographic audit trail for ops teams
Developer-friendly E2EE alternative to Slack for sensitive ops

pros: End-to-end encrypted team secrets and chat
Free for teams, low setup friction
Git and KBFS integrations are handy
review.verdict: Still cryptographically solid, but the stagnation since the Zoom acquisition makes it hard to recommend new.
review.best_for: Small distributed teams wanting encrypted chat and light secret sharing.
review.not_for: Orgs that need an actively maintained, API-driven secrets vault.
